nasb.text: Ahaz was twenty years old when he became king, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem; and he did not do right in the sight of the Lord as David his father had done.

esv.text: Ahaz was twenty years old when he began to reign, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem. And he did not do what was right in the eyes of the Lord, as his father David had done,

cnv.text: 亞哈斯登基的時候，是二十歲；他在耶路撒冷作王十六年。他不像他的祖先大衛一樣，行耶和華看為正的事，

ccb.text: 亚哈斯二十岁登基，在耶路撒冷执政十六年。他没有效法他祖先大卫做耶和华视为正的事，
